item.title: Alibaba, Goldman Sachs, Cheniere Energy And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
item.description: BABA, IGV, LNG, and GS are today's "final trades" on CNBC. Analysts discussed recent news about these companies' financial results. Importance Rank: 1...

item.title: Bitcoin Holds $73,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin See Renewed Institutional Demand
item.description: Bitcoin is holding on to $73,000 amid strong institutional demand as liquidations stand at $472.88 million over the past 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs saw $1...

item.title: Why Is IREN Stock Falling Thursday?
item.description: IREN orders 50,000 Nvidia GPUs, expanding AI cloud capacity to 150,000 GPUs. Jim Chanos questions equity filing, citing lack of disclosure. Importance...

item.title: Lam Research Shares Hit Intraday High After Key Trading Signal
